.editorconfig.general_idea: Configure editor to preserve trailing whitespace in Markdown files

.gitignore.general_idea: Add logs directory to gitignore to prevent committing runtime log files.
Add Gradle build directory to gitignore as the project migrated from Maven to Gradle.
Ensure .mvn and .github directories are not ignored despite wildcard rules.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the target Java version from 11 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version remains at 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Kotlin version from 1.5.31 to 1.9.21 to support JDK 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Kotlin 1.5.x does not support generating bytecode for JVM target 21, causing compilation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot Maven Plugin from 2.5.5 to 3.2.2 to support JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support JDK 21; the build will fail or produce incompatible artifacts without upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Vert.x version from 4.1.5 to 4.5.1 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21 and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Vert.x versions may have runtime incompatibilities or missing features required for the new JDK/Spring Boot stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jackson BOM from 2.13.0 to 2.16.1 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Jackson 2.14+; using older versions causes dependency conflicts or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove vertx-hazelcast dependency which is likely incompatible or unnecessary in the new stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: The dependency was removed, likely due to incompatibility with the new Vert.x version or removal of Hazelcast integration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace kotlin-logging-jvm and logback with slf4j-simple for simplified logging.
pom.xml.why_exists: The previous logging setup was replaced; this is a configuration change rather than a strict JDK compatibility fix.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add GraalVM Native Image Maven plugin for native compilation support.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition, not a fix for a breakage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add exec-maven-plugin to allow running the application via Maven.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a new feature addition.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch Maven repository from Aliyun mirror to Central Maven Repository.
pom.xml.why_exists: This is a configuration preference change.
Version downgrade/upgrade for plugin compatibility or preference.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.general_idea: Replace deprecated Kotlin coroutines integration with standard Vert.x blocking callback pattern.
src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.why_exists: The `io.vertx.kotlin.coroutines` package and `await()` extension functions are deprecated/removed in newer Vert.x versions, causing compilation errors or runtime linkage failures if the dependency is updated or removed.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.general_idea: Switch from clustered Vert.x instance to standalone instance.
src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.why_exists: The application logic was simplified to no longer require cluster management, removing the dependency on Hazelcast cluster formation which might fail or be unnecessary in the new deployment context.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.general_idea: Migrate verticle deployment to use ThreadingModel.VIRTUAL_THREAD.
src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.why_exists: Java 21 introduces virtual threads, and newer Vert.x versions support this threading model explicitly. Using the old deployment style might not leverage virtual threads or might be deprecated in favor of the explicit ThreadingModel enum.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.general_idea: Add explicit Hazelcast logging configuration for SLF4J.
src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.why_exists: Hazelcast (used by Vert.x clustering or internally) may fail to initialize logging correctly or produce warnings/errors if the logging type is not explicitly set to slf4j in newer versions.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.general_idea: Replace wildcard import with specific import for StompBridgeVerticle.
src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.why_exists: Wildcard imports are often discouraged in modern Java/Kotlin coding standards and may cause ambiguity or maintenance issues, though not strictly a compile error.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.general_idea: Add SLF4J logger instance and usage.
src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.why_exists: The application previously lacked structured logging in the main entry point, which is added for better observability in the new version.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/verticle/StompBri.general_idea: Replace KotlinLogging with SLF4J for logging to align with standard Java logging practices or remove Kotlin-specific dependencies.
src/main/java/cn/mmooo/verticle/StompBri.before:
import mu.*
private val logger = KotlinLogging.logger { }

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/verticle/StompBri.general_idea: Migrate from CoroutineVerticle to AbstractVerticle to remove dependency on vertx-lang-kotlin-coroutines, which may be deprecated or incompatible with newer Vert.x versions.
src/main/java/cn/mmooo/verticle/StompBri.after:
class StompBridgeVerticle : AbstractVerticle() {
  override fun start() {

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/verticle/StompBri.general_idea: Update router handler chain to use fluent API and add TimeoutHandler and StaticHandler, removing deprecated or unnecessary handlers.
Update body access method from deprecated getBodyAsString to body().asString() to match newer Vert.x Web API.
Update HTTP server creation to use also block for configuration and add v12.stomp subprotocol.
Make server port configurable via environment variable PUSH_PORT instead of hardcoded value.
Add health check endpoint for container orchestration compatibility.
Update logging calls to use SLF4J lambda-based logging methods.
Update error handling to use SLF4J atError with cause setting.
Add info logging for successful push requests.
